caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold and white text sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table and speaks into a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. He wears black over-ear headphones and looks toward someone off-camera to his right. In the background, a white banner features the text "UNION MUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside five gold stars. A blue sign above him reads, "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug sits on the table with "BOSS TALK ONLY" written in red and white. A small logo reading "BOSS TALK ONLY" is visible in the lower-left corner. Across the frames, the man's facial expression and posture remain nearly identical as he continues talking, with only slight shifts in his head position and mouth movements.
